channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Grassley: Democrats Who Weaponized DOJ Hate Blanche, Which Proves He's a Good AG Pick
item.description: Senator Grassley says that just before a hearing or vote, another accusation emerges against a Trump nominee.

item.title: American Higher Education Requires Major Reform
item.description: A system designed for the 20th century is creating distortions in the 21st.

item.title: New Evidence Bolsters Claims That Jack Smith's Team Violated Constitution in Trump Investigation
item.description: Given this newly surfaced evidence, it raises questions about what other rights the special counsel's office may have infringed.

item.title: Trump Lacks the Resolve for This Confrontation
item.description: The president should avoid another drawn-out humiliation in Iran and end the situation decisively.
